features: 10 DIFFERENT TYPES IN ONE PACKAGE: Snail, Q10, Collagen, Ginseng, Tea Tree, Cucumber, Hyaluronic Acid, Aqua, Aloe, Vitamin C - offering a variety of nourishing ingredients to target different skin concerns.
ULTIMATE HYDRATION & NOURISHMENT: Each sheet mask is infused with premium ingredients designed to deeply hydrate, brighten, and revitalize the skin, leaving it soft and glowing.
SUITABLE FOR ALL SKIN TYPES: These gentle masks are designed for all skin types, including sensitive, dry, and oily skin, delivering hydration and promoting a youthful, radiant complexion.

EASY & CONVENIENT SELF-CARE: Enjoy a spa-like facial treatment at home with our easy-to-use sheet masks. Simply apply, relax, and let the mask do its work for 15-20 minutes – perfect for a quick skin refresh.
★ MADE IN KOREA ★ CRUELTY FREE ★ NATURAL INGREDIENTS ★ EXPERIENCE THE BEST OF KOREAN SKINCARE
description: Product Description Dive into the world of Korean skincare with our revitalizing face sheet masks! GLOW BEYOND BORDERS OUR MISSION VLYCO's mission is to create high-quality skincare products that are both effective and affordable for everyone. SUITABLE FOR ALL SKIN TYPES Whether you have sensitive or regular skin, you can enjoy the benefits of our products without any concerns. GIVE YOUR SKIN WHAT IT CRAVES Pamper your skin daily with a sheet mask – the easiest way to hydrate, brighten, and rejuvenate. In one pack, you will receive 1 of each type of VLYCO mask. Each mask is designed to target specific skin concerns, delivering instant hydration and a radiant glow. Aloe Vera Face Sheet Mask Contains Aloe Vera Extract , which absorbs faster than water, helping to supply moisture. Hydration and Moisture : Aloe vera is rich in water content, which deeply hydrates the skin without leaving a greasy feel, making it great for moisturizing. Cooling and Soothing : Aloe vera provides an instant cooling effect, making it ideal for soothing sunburns, and inflammation. Q10 Face Sheet Mask Contains Ubiquinone (Q10) to energise tired, lifeless skin. Powerful Antioxidant : Ubiquinone protects the skin from free radical damage, helping to prevent signs of aging and maintain a youthful appearance. Reduces Fine Lines and Wrinkles : By stimulating collagen and elastin production, ubiquinone helps minimize the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, leading to smoother skin. Ginseng Face Sheet Mask Contains Saponin from Red Ginseng Extract to keep skin youthful and healthy. Skin Revitalising Power : Ginseng helps stimulate collagen synthesis, improving skin elasticity and reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Energizes and Brightens Skin : It promotes circulation and revitalizes dull, tired-looking skin, leading to a more radiant and even complexion. Collagen Face Sheet Mask Contains Hydrolysed Collagen to help maintain skin elasticity and moisture. Enhances Skin Glow : Collagen helps improve skin texture and hydration, giving the skin a radiant, youthful glow while reducing dullness. Enhances Skin Glow : Collagen helps improve skin texture and hydration, giving the skin a radiant, youthful glow while reducing dullness. Cucumber Face Sheet Mask Contains Cucumber Fruit Extract , which holds a large amount of moisture Hydrates and Refreshes : Rich in water content, cucumber provides a refreshing burst of hydration, leaving the skin soft and moisturized. Tightens and Firms Skin : Cucumber has astringent properties that help tighten pores and improve skin elasticity, giving the skin a smoother and firmer appearance. Tea Tree Face Sheet Mask Contains Tea Tree Extract known for its calming effects Soothing effect : Tea tree oil provides a calming sensation, making your skin feel more comfortable and refreshed. Calming on sensitive skin : Tea tree oil helps ease discomfort, making your skin feel more balanced and relaxed. Vitamin C Face Sheet Mask Contains Pure Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid) Brightens Skin : Vitamin C helps reduce hyperpigmentation and dark spots, leading to a more even and radiant complexion. Antioxidant Protection : Vitamin C protects the skin from environmental damage caused by free radicals, such as pollution and UV radiation. Aqua Face Sheet Mask Contains Squalane , which is light yet highly moisturizing Deeply Hydrates : Squalane mimics the skin's natural oils, providing lightweight, non-greasy hydration that locks in moisture and helps maintain the skin barrier. Quick Absorption : The lightweight, watery formula allows for quick absorption into the skin, providing immediate hydration without a heavy or greasy feel. Snal Mucin Face Sheet Mask Contains Snail Secretion Filtrate enriched with nutrients like Collagen and Mucin, providing flexible and smooth skincare. Hydrates and Moisturizes : Rich in hyaluronic acid, snail mucin provides deep hydration, helping to keep the skin plump and supple. Improves Skin Texture : It helps smooth and refine skin texture by promoting cell turnover, reducing the appearance of fine lines, and enhancing overall radiance. Hyaluronic Acid Face SHeet Mask Contains Hyaluronic Acid, known as a moisture magnet for its excellent moisturizing action Enhances Skin Elasticity : By retaining moisture, it helps improve skin elasticity and reduces the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, promoting a more youthful complexion. Skin Barrier Protection : It strengthens the skin’s natural barrier, helping to protect against environmental aggressors and prevent moisture loss. 3 Simple Steps Step 1: Cleanse your face Wash your face with a gentle cleanser to remove any dirt, oil, or makeup. Step 2: Apply the mask Unfold the sheet mask and gently place it over your face, making sure it aligns with your eyes, nose, and mouth. Step 3: Relax and remove Leave the mask on for 15-20 minutes. Then, remove it and gently pat any remaining serum into your skin without rinsing.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: For external use only. Avoid direct contact with eyes; if contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. If you experience any irritation, redness, or discomfort, discontinue use immediately. Keep out of reach of children. Consult a physician if irritation persists or if you have any concerns regarding the use of this product. Store in a cool, dry place.
